title: Death at Owell Rock
original_title: La morte non conta i dollari
overview: Lawrence and Jane White are determined to find the man responsible for their father's murder. They suspect a number of people in the town of Owell Rock and hire a professional gunfighter to help them in their quest for vengeance...  Source: SWDB www.spaghetti-western.net
